agent.status: Added a guardrail on retiring a game: a captain can't shut one down for good until it's gone 4 straight weeks with no game actually happening — so a live game can't be killed off on a whim. Until then the retire button is greyed out with an explanation, and pausing is the way to take a temporary break.
agent.direction: Open to the next thing — more live-testing fixes or a new feature.
